summary: The implementation successfully addresses all 6 requirements. A ProjectDropdown component was added to the topbar, WelcomeScreen and ProjectSelection pages were created for navigation after login/logout, session management hooks were implemented using LocalStorage, and auto-loading logic was added to App.tsx. All acceptance criteria appear to be met based on the diff evidence.

hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention a ProjectSelection page. REQ-2 and REQ-3 specify navigation destinations (Roadmap page for 'Create New Project' and project dashboard for 'Return to Existing Project'), but a dedicated ProjectSelection page was not requested. The WelcomeScreen should handle the 'Return to Existing Project' action by navigating to the last used project's dashboard, not to a separate project selection page.

hallucinated_features.description: ApplyInvite page modifications including useProjectSession hook integration
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention modifying the ApplyInvite page or integrating session management into the invite flow. While REQ-5 mentions saving project ID when joining via invite, the ApplyInvite page modifications (importing useProjectSession, calling setLastUsedProjectId) go beyond what was specified. The requirement could be satisfied without modifying this existing page.
